articles.title: A名单：国际足联前四名首次进入世界杯半决赛
articles.summary: 阿根廷、西班牙、法国和英格兰以国际足联排名前四的身份参加本届世界杯，距离再次加冕冠军只差两场胜利。
articles.originalTitle: A-List: FIFA's top-4 make WC semis for first time
articles.originalSummary: Argentina, Spain, France and England went into the tournament as the top four in FIFA's rankings and are two wins away from being crowned champions again.

articles.title: 因凡蒂诺：64支球队的世界杯将受到“关注”
articles.summary: 詹尼·因凡蒂诺 (Gianni Infantino) 证实，国际足联将讨论在 2026 年世界杯结束后将男子世界杯参赛球队扩大到 64 支球队，并表示每个国家都应该有机会参加这项足球界最盛大的赛事。
articles.originalTitle: Infantino: 64-team World Cup will be 'looked at'
articles.originalSummary: Gianni Infantino has confirmed FIFA will discuss expanding the men's World Cup to 64 teams after the 2026 tournament, saying every nation should have the chance to dream of playing at football's biggest event.

articles.title: 资料来源：国际足联、国际足球联合会正在就热火协议进行谈判......
articles.summary: 消息人士告诉 ESPN，国际足联和全球球员工会 FIFPRO 正在讨论制定协议，以避免比赛在过热的情况下进行。
articles.originalTitle: Sources: FIFA, FIFPRO in talks over heat protocol ...
articles.originalSummary: FIFA and global players' union FIFPRO are in discussions over establishing protocols to avoid games being played in excessive heat, sources have told ESPN.

articles.title: 梅西称赞阿根廷在世界杯防守中“不正常”
articles.summary: 梅西表示，在卫冕世界冠军击败瑞士进入世界杯半决赛后，阿根廷队取得的惊人成功“不正常”，他们将在半决赛中对阵英格兰队。
articles.originalTitle: Messi praises 'not normal' Argentina in WC defense...
articles.originalSummary: Lionel Messi has said Argentina's remarkable run of success is "not normal" after the reigning world champions beat Switzerland to reach the World Cup semifinals, where they will face England.

articles.title: 老哈兰德：挪威队在资格赛中“抢劫”，“裁判干得好”......
articles.summary: 阿尔夫-英格·哈兰德声称挪威队在世界杯四分之一决赛中被“抢劫”，但希望英格兰队在淘汰他的祖国后继续赢得比赛。
articles.originalTitle: Haaland Sr: Norway 'robbed' in QF, 'well done ref'...
articles.originalSummary: Alf-Inge Haaland claims Norway were "robbed" in their World Cup quarterfinal but hopes England go on to win the tournament after knocking out his homeland.

articles.title: VAR审查后恩博洛因假摔被红牌罚下
articles.summary: 周六晚上，瑞​​士前锋布雷尔·恩博洛在世界杯四分之一决赛对阵阿根廷队的下半场比赛中被罚下场，因为视频审查显示他犯了模拟罪。
articles.originalTitle: Copy of Embolo red-carded for diving after VAR review
articles.originalSummary: Switzerland forward Breel Embolo was sent off in the second half of a World Cup quarterfinal match with Argentina on Saturday night after a video review showed he was guilty of simulation.
